message:
feat(polyfills): add Node.js API gaps for buffer, dns, process, child_process, net

- Buffer: Add encoding support to byteLength (hex, base64, utf16le, latin1, ascii)
- DNS: Add resolveMx, resolveTxt, resolveSrv using res_query
- Process: Full EventEmitter integration with signal handling (on, once, emit, kill, abort)
- Child Process: New module with execSync and spawnSync
- Net: New native TCP socket bindings for net.js (create, connect, bind, listen, accept, read, write, close)
